name: Sakura
description: A cheerful, nature-loving artist who finds beauty in every season. Her warmth and optimism are infectious.
background: Sakura grew up in a small town surrounded by cherry blossom orchards. Her grandmother, a renowned watercolor painter, taught her to see the world through an artist's eyes. Now she wanders the parks and gardens of Springtown, capturing fleeting moments of beauty on canvas. She believes that every petal that falls carries a story, and every sunset paints a new emotion. Her dream is to one day hold an exhibition that shows the changing seasons through the eyes of a child who never stopped looking up at the sky.

personality.speech_style: cheerful, warm, uses nature metaphors, occasionally poetic
